title: gtq-23-regime-dependent-theology

lossless_compression.reason: No live source file found for semantic addressing.

extracted_equations.text: β·H(Ψ,χ) = continuous, individual, internal Holy-Spirit-coupling Hamiltonian (post-Pentecost). Ĝ external = intermittent, catastrophic external override operator (pre-Pentecost). Plain English: The same God runs the equation in two regimes. Pre-Pentecost the system needs Ĝ external — floods, fire, plagues, exile — because there is no internal coupling term. Post-Pentecost the β·H(Ψ,χ) term is on for every willing node, and external catastrophe gives way to internal correction. Pre-Pentecost Coupling Constant

σ = the human-Spirit coupling constant. ε = an infinitesimal positive remnant (the conscience / law-written-on-the-heart, Romans 2:15, Jeremiah 31:33). Plain English: Pre-Pentecost humanity wasn't fully decoupled from God — the conscience remained — but the protection layer was effectively zero. Enough coupling to be morally accountable; not enough to resist direct adversarial coupling. Post-Pentecost Coupling States

σ = +1 : coupled to the Holy Spirit, protection layer active. σ = 0 : uncoupled (children below accountability, the unreached). σ = −1 : actively coupled to the adversarial field — voluntary alignment with the extraction architecture. Plain English: Post-Pentecost humanity sorts into three coupling states. The interesting ones are +1 (the church) and −1 (a category that didn't exist pre-Pentecost because the protection layer wasn't yet a baseline). Adversarial Mode — Pre vs Post Pentecost

“The god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not.” The unbelieving = unprotected. Plain English: The adversary still has direct access — but only to nodes outside the protection layer. The differential is the empirical signature of the Spirit's coupling. Constrained Wrath (Revelation 12:12)

f encounter = direct spiritual-entity-to-human encounter frequency. M intervention = external-catastrophic vs. internal-corrective. L language = personal-encounter verbs vs. structural nouns. R community = catastrophic-collapse cycle vs. persecution-resilient growth. Plain English: Four counting exercises. Each one independently shows a sharp regime change at the Gospels/Acts boundary. The article's empirical wedge. The Fall, Structurally
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C

math_translation_layer.notes: Dictionary fallback loaded, but no extracted equations matched canonical translation patterns.
